chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3391 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Faiz Durrani Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh 1167 Petitioners have filed this petition seeking regularization. Prima facie the entitlement of not a single petitioner has been placed on record / demonstrated therefrom. The law in respect of regularization is clear. In mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined vide judgment of Supreme Court of Pakistan in Vice Chancellor Agriculture University Peshawar & Others vs. Muhammad Shafiq & Others reported as 2024 SCMR 527, Full bench of this Court in Muhammad Arif vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2025 P.L.C. (C.S) 93 and Division Bench of this Court in Mumtaz Ali Panhwar & Others vs. Province of Sindh & Others reported as 2024 P.L.C. (C.S) 1487 this petition is found to be not maintainable, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
